query:
INSERT INTO business_positions (businessEntityId, houseId, title, department, description, classificationType, employmentType, exemptionStatus, compensationType, salaryAmount, status, createdAt, updatedAt) 
VALUES (1, 1, 'Health Manager', 'Health', 'Oversees health and wellness programs, employee health initiatives, and health-related compliance. Manages health operations and coordinates with HR on employee wellness benefits.', 'w2_employee', 'full_time', 'exempt', 'salary', 76500, 'open', NOW(), NOW());
